description_long: This is a life-sized model of a giraffe, characterized by its long neck, slender legs, and distinctive coat pattern of irregular light tan patches separated by white lines. The animal's head is small relative to its body, with two ossicones (horn-like structures) on top, large ears, and a long, dark tongue visible in some views. Its body is robust yet elegant, with a gently sloping back and a short tail ending in a tuft of dark hair. The legs are long and thin, with the front legs appearing slightly longer than the hind legs, and the hooves are dark and well-defined. The surface texture appears to mimic the short, coarse fur of a real giraffe, and the coloration is naturalistic, with a gradient from darker brown on the neck to lighter tan on the body and white on the lower legs. This object would stand out in an urban park or zoo setting due to its height and striking pattern.
description: A tall, realistic giraffe with a long neck, tan and white patchwork coat, and slender legs, featuring detailed facial features and ossicones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the giraffe's symmetrical face, long neck, and straight legs, with both ossicones and ears clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the elongated neck, sloping back, and the full pattern of the coat, with the head turned slightly forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the giraffe's back, tail with a tuft, and the symmetry of the legs and body, with the neck extending straight up.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, showing the neck's curve, body profile, and the detailed leg and hoof structure.
